# Form Engine

> A React library for rendering complex, configuration-driven forms with a built-in rules engine. Define forms as JSON configurations (IFormConfig v2) and the library handles rendering, validation, auto-save, and field interactions automatically. UI-library agnostic -- works with Fluent UI, MUI, headless HTML, or any React component library. Published as six packages: `@form-engine/core` (engine + orchestration), `@form-engine/fluent` (Fluent UI v9 adapter), `@form-engine/mui` (Material UI adapter), `@form-engine/headless` (unstyled semantic HTML adapter), `@form-engine/designer` (visual drag-and-drop form builder), and `@form-engine/examples` (3 example apps).

The library centers on four key concepts: a **declarative rules engine** that evaluates field dependencies, visibility, required state, and computed values from declarative `IRule[]` definitions with rich conditions (15 operators + AND/OR/NOT); a **component injection system** where UI field implementations are registered by string key and rendered via `React.cloneElement`; **pluggable registries** for custom sync/async validation and value functions referenced by name in field configs; and **i18n support** via a locale registry with partial overrides and English fallback. v2.0 adds the unified rules engine (IRule/ICondition/IFieldEffect), per-field error boundaries, save reliability (AbortController + retry), accessibility (focus trap, ARIA live regions, focus-to-first-error), draft persistence to localStorage, theming via CSS custom properties and render props, a DevTools panel (Rules, Values, Errors, Graph, Perf, Deps, Timeline tabs), JSON Schema import, Zod Schema import, lazy field registry for code splitting, analytics/telemetry (IAnalyticsCallbacks, useFormAnalytics), and performance debugging helpers (RenderTracker, EventTimeline).

## Docs

- [README.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/README.md): Full usage guide with quick start, field types, architecture diagram, and examples
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Detailed architecture, rendering pipeline, key directories, and coding conventions
- [docs/creating-an-adapter.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/creating-an-adapter.md): Guide for building custom UI library adapters
- [docs/ACCESSIBILITY.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/ACCESSIBILITY.md): Accessibility guide (ARIA, keyboard, screen readers)
- [docs/ssr-guide.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/ssr-guide.md): Server-side rendering guide
- [docs/analytics-telemetry.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/analytics-telemetry.md): Analytics and telemetry integration
- [docs/performance-debugging.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/performance-debugging.md): Performance debugging with DevTools
- [docs/field-config-reference.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/field-config-reference.md): IFieldConfig v2 reference
- [docs/expression-syntax.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/expression-syntax.md): Expression syntax ($values, $fn, $parent)
- [packages/core/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/core/llms.txt): Core package API reference for LLMs
- [packages/fluent/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/fluent/llms.txt): Fluent UI adapter API reference for LLMs
- [packages/mui/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/mui/llms.txt): MUI adapter API reference for LLMs
- [packages/headless/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/headless/llms.txt): Headless adapter API reference for LLMs
- [packages/designer/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/designer/llms.txt): Designer API reference for LLMs
- [packages/headless/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/headless/llms.txt): Headless adapter API reference for LLMs

## Packages

### @form-engine/core

UI-library agnostic engine built for React. Depends only on `react` and `react-hook-form`.

- **Providers**: `RulesEngineProvider`, `InjectedFieldProvider` -- React context providers that must wrap the form tree (memoized)
- **Components**: `FormEngine` (entry point, save with AbortController/retry/timeout), `FormFields`, `RenderField` (useMemo, async validation wired), `FieldWrapper` (React.memo, render props for theming), `ConfirmInputsModal` (focus trap), `WizardForm` (multi-step wizard, step announcements), `FieldArray` (repeating sections), `FormErrorBoundary` (per-field crash isolation), `FormDevTools` (dev-only debugging panel with Rules, Values, Errors, Graph, Perf, Deps, Timeline tabs)
- **Rules Engine**: `buildDependencyGraph`, `evaluateAllRules`, `evaluateAffectedFields`, `processFieldChange`, `topologicalSort`, `evaluateCondition` (15 operators + AND/OR/NOT), priority-based conflict resolution
- **Validation**: 14 built-in validators + `registerValidators()` for custom sync/async/cross-field. Per-rule `when` condition, `debounceMs`, `async` flag. Factory functions: `createMinLengthValidation`, `createMaxLengthValidation`, `createNumericRangeValidation`, `createPatternValidation`, `createRequiredIfValidation`
- **Config Validation**: `validateFieldConfigs()` -- dev-mode checks for missing deps, unregistered components/validators, circular deps
- **Cycle Detection**: `validateDependencyGraph()` -- Kahn's algorithm on dependency graphs
- **i18n**: `registerLocale()`, `getLocaleString()`, `resetLocale()` -- partial locale overrides with English fallback
- **Wizard**: `getVisibleSteps()`, `getStepFields()`, `validateStepFields()`, `isStepValid()`, `getStepIndex()`
- **Registries**: `registerValidators()` (unified sync+async), `registerValueFunctions()` -- plug in custom functions by name
- **Hooks**: `useDraftPersistence()` (auto-save to localStorage, recover on mount), `useBeforeUnload()` (browser warning on unsaved changes), `useFormAnalytics()` (analytics callback wrapper)
- **Serialization**: `serializeFormState()`, `deserializeFormState()` -- Date-safe JSON round-trip
- **Schema Import**: `jsonSchemaToFieldConfig()` -- convert JSON Schema to `Record<string, IFieldConfig>`
- **Zod Import**: `zodSchemaToFieldConfig()` -- convert Zod object schemas to `Record<string, IFieldConfig>` (no zod dependency). Maps ZodString->Textbox, ZodNumber->Number, ZodBoolean->Toggle, ZodEnum->Dropdown, ZodDate->DateControl, ZodArray->Multiselect
- **Type Safety**: `defineFormConfig()` -- zero-cost TypeScript utility for type-safe form configs
- **JSON Schemas**: `schemas/field-config.schema.json` and `schemas/wizard-config.schema.json` for IDE autocompletion
- **Lazy Loading**: `createLazyFieldRegistry()` -- React.lazy field registry for code splitting
- **Theming**: CSS custom properties (`--fe-error-color`, etc.) via optional `styles.css`, render props on `FieldWrapper`
- **Accessibility**: Focus trap in modals, focus-to-first-error, ARIA live regions, wizard step announcements
- **Analytics**: `IAnalyticsCallbacks` (8 event hooks), `useFormAnalytics()` hook
- **Performance**: `RenderTracker` (per-field render count tracking), `EventTimeline` (chronological event log)
- **Types**: `IFormConfig`, `IFieldConfig`, `IRule`, `ICondition`, `IFieldCondition`, `ILogicalCondition`, `IFieldEffect`, `IFieldProps<T>`, `IOption`, `IValidationRule`, `IRuntimeFieldState`, `IRuntimeFormState`, `IRulesEngineState`, `IRulesEngineAction`, `IWizardConfig`, `IAnalyticsCallbacks`, `ICoreLocaleStrings`, `ComponentTypes`

### @form-engine/fluent

Fluent UI v9 adapter. Provides 19 field components (13 editable + 6 read-only).

- **Registry**: `createFluentFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: HookTextbox, HookDropdown, HookToggle, HookNumber, HookMultiSelect, HookDateControl, HookSlider, HookSimpleDropdown, HookMultiSelectSearch, HookPopOutEditor, HookDocumentLinks, HookStatusDropdown, HookFragment
- **Read-Only Fields**: HookReadOnly, HookReadOnlyArray, HookReadOnlyDateTime, HookReadOnlyCumulativeNumber, HookReadOnlyRichText, HookReadOnlyWithButton

### @form-engine/mui

Material UI (MUI) adapter. Provides 19 field components (13 editable + 6 read-only).

- **Registry**: `createMuiFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: HookTextbox, HookDropdown, HookToggle, HookNumber, HookMultiSelect, HookDateControl, HookSlider, HookSimpleDropdown, HookMultiSelectSearch, HookPopOutEditor, HookDocumentLinks, HookStatusDropdown, HookFragment
- **Read-Only Fields**: HookReadOnly, HookReadOnlyArray, HookReadOnlyDateTime, HookReadOnlyCumulativeNumber, HookReadOnlyRichText, HookReadOnlyWithButton

### @form-engine/headless

Unstyled semantic HTML adapter. No UI framework dependency. Provides 19 field components (13 editable + 6 read-only) using plain HTML elements with data-* attributes and ARIA roles.

- **Registry**: `createHeadlessFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: HookTextbox, HookDropdown, HookToggle, HookNumber, HookMultiSelect, HookDateControl, HookSlider, HookSimpleDropdown, HookMultiSelectSearch, HookPopOutEditor, HookDocumentLinks, HookStatusDropdown, HookFragment
- **Read-Only Fields**: HookReadOnly, HookReadOnlyArray, HookReadOnlyDateTime, HookReadOnlyCumulativeNumber, HookReadOnlyRichText, HookReadOnlyWithButton
- **Optional CSS**: `styles.css` with CSS custom properties for basic styling

### @form-engine/designer

Visual drag-and-drop form builder that outputs IFormConfig v2 JSON.

- **Components**: `FormDesigner` (main entry), `FieldPalette` (drag source), `FormCanvas` (drop target), `FieldConfigPanel` (field property editor), `RuleBuilder` (visual rule editor), `ConfigPreview` (live JSON preview), `WizardConfigurator` (step editor), `ImportExport` (JSON import/export)
- **State**: `DesignerProvider`, `useDesigner` hook, `designerReducer`
- **Types**: `IDesignerState`, `IDesignerAction`

### @form-engine/examples

Three example applications demonstrating common form patterns.

- **login-mfa**: Conditional MFA fields, dynamic labels
- **checkout**: Wizard form, dropdown dependencies, payment branching
- **data-entry**: Field arrays, computed values, cross-field validation

## Examples

### Minimal Setup (Fluent UI)

```tsx
import { RulesEngineProvider, InjectedFieldProvider, UseInjectedFieldContext, FormEngine } from "@form-engine/core";
import { createFluentFieldRegistry } from "@form-engine/fluent";

function FieldRegistrar({ children }) {
  const { setInjectedFields } = UseInjectedFieldContext();
  useEffect(() => setInjectedFields(createFluentFieldRegistry()), []);
  return <>{children}</>;
}

const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    name: { type: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true },
  },
  fieldOrder: ["name"],
};

<RulesEngineProvider>
  <InjectedFieldProvider>
    <FieldRegistrar>
      <FormEngine
        configName="myForm"
        programName="myApp"
        formConfig={formConfig}
        defaultValues={{ name: "" }}
        saveData={async (data) => data}
      />
    </FieldRegistrar>
  </InjectedFieldProvider>
</RulesEngineProvider>
```

### Swap to MUI (one import change)

```tsx
import { createMuiFieldRegistry } from "@form-engine/mui";
setInjectedFields(createMuiFieldRegistry()); // that's it
```

### Swap to Headless (one import change)

```tsx
import { createHeadlessFieldRegistry } from "@form-engine/headless";
setInjectedFields(createHeadlessFieldRegistry()); // that's it
```

### Rules Engine (v2 Declarative Rules)

```tsx
const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    type: {
      type: "Dropdown",
      label: "Type",
      options: [
        { value: "bug", label: "Bug" },
        { value: "feature", label: "Feature" },
      ],
    },
    severity: {
      type: "Dropdown",
      label: "Severity",
      hidden: true,
      rules: [
        {
          when: { field: "type", operator: "equals", value: "bug" },
          then: { required: true, hidden: false },
          else: { hidden: true },
          priority: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
  },
  fieldOrder: ["type", "severity"],
};
```

### Validation (Unified Registry)

```tsx
import { registerValidators } from "@form-engine/core";

registerValidators({
  CheckUniqueEmail: {
    fn: async (value, entityData, signal) => {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/check?email=${value}`, { signal });
      const { exists } = await res.json();
      return exists ? "Already in use" : undefined;
    },
    async: true,
  },
});

// In field config: validate: [{ name: "CheckUniqueEmail", async: true, debounceMs: 500 }]
```

### i18n

```tsx
import { registerLocale } from "@form-engine/core";
registerLocale({ required: "Obligatoire", save: "Sauvegarder" });
```

### Wizard

```tsx
import { WizardForm } from "@form-engine/core";

const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: { /* ... */ },
  wizard: {
    steps: [
      { id: "basics", title: "Basics", fields: ["name", "type"] },
      {
        id: "details",
        title: "Details",
        fields: ["description"],
        visibleWhen: { field: "type", operator: "equals", value: "bug" },
      },
    ],
    validateOnStepChange: true,
  },
};

<WizardForm
  formConfig={formConfig}
  entityData={formValues}
  renderStepContent={(fields) => <FieldRenderer fields={fields} />}
  renderStepNavigation={({ goNext, goPrev, canGoNext, canGoPrev }) => (
    <nav>
      <button onClick={goPrev} disabled={!canGoPrev}>Back</button>
      <button onClick={goNext} disabled={!canGoNext}>Next</button>
    </nav>
  )}
/>
```

### Analytics

```tsx
import { useFormAnalytics, IAnalyticsCallbacks } from "@form-engine/core";

const analytics: IAnalyticsCallbacks = {
  onFieldChange: (fieldName, oldValue, newValue) => track("field_change", { fieldName }),
  onSaveStart: () => track("save_start"),
  onSaveSuccess: (duration) => track("save_success", { duration }),
  onSaveError: (error) => track("save_error", { error: error.message }),
  onRuleEvaluated: (rule, result) => track("rule_evaluated", { rule: rule.id }),
  onValidationError: (fieldName, errors) => track("validation_error", { fieldName }),
  onStepChange: (fromStep, toStep) => track("step_change", { fromStep, toStep }),
  onFormMount: (config) => track("form_mount", { config: config.configName }),
};

const formAnalytics = useFormAnalytics(analytics);
```
